title: Type proposal import and reload recovery surfaces
summary: Unify proposal artifact import and reload failures behind more truthful typed recovery surfaces so native proposal workspaces explain whether the issue is missing repo setup, unreadable artifact content, or partial reload degradation instead of showing only isolated warning cards.
acceptance_criteria: Proposal artifact failures map to typed native recovery surfaces with explicit category, posture, and next-step guidance instead of only generic warning copy.
Proposal workspaces distinguish between fully blocked proposal loading and partial degradation when at least some artifacts still load.
Shared proposal recovery helpers are reusable across proposal-facing inspectors instead of duplicating page-local failure mapping.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, repo contract validation, and a targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: Proposal artifact recovery surfaces now distinguish between fully blocked loading and partial reload degradation, with typed category, posture, recovery channel, and next-step guidance.
All proposal-facing native reload paths now preserve load issues instead of dropping them when artifacts reload inside review and navigation inspectors.
Confirmed patch hygiene and whitespace correctness.
Repo contract still passes after typing proposal import and reload recovery surfaces.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
evidence.note: Targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build succeeded after wiring the shared proposal recovery surfaces.

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 item 1 after HS-0036: type proposal import and reload failure workflow into native recovery surfaces.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: Keep proposal failure messaging truthful about partial reloads versus fully blocked artifact access.
Prefer shared recovery mapping so future proposal inspectors can reuse the same typed surface.

Runner handoff note on July 20, 2026: P0 cleanup of other HumbleStudio Codex tasks could not be completed from this chat because thread-management tools like `list_threads`, `read_thread`, and `set_thread_archived` were not available in the session.
